name: exam-room-allocation-system
description: Backend API for a web-based Exam Room Allocation System built with Node.js, Express, MongoDB, and Mongoose, designed to streamline exam scheduling, automate room allocation, and provide students with instant access to their personalized exam venues.

scripts.setup-project: npm i && cd client && npm i
scripts.setup-production-app: npm i && cd client && npm i && npm run build
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail " npm run server" " npm run client"

author: Kelvin Oppong Agyeman <kelvinagyeman11@gmail.com> (https://github.com/kelvin-agyeman)
